# Ghoudi Zakaria - Portfolio

> Full-Stack Web Developer specializing in React, Node.js, and AI-assisted web development. This site showcases projects, skills, and background.

## Pages

- [Home](https://ghoudizakaria.vercel.app/): Introduction, hero section, and quick overview of skills and featured projects.
- [About](https://ghoudizakaria.vercel.app/about): Background, skills (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js), and education.
- [Projects](https://ghoudizakaria.vercel.app/projects): Full list of projects including Movie App, Weather App, Chat Application, To-Do List App, Calculator, and Simple Clock and more...
- [Blog](https://ghoudizakaria.vercel.app/blog): Articles and posts about web development, React, Node.js, and software engineering topics.
- [Contact](https://ghoudizakaria.vercel.app/contact): Contact form and direct contact information.

## Notes

- Built with React (Create React App), React Router, and Framer Motion.
- Blog posts are accessible individually at /blog/:slug.
- Source code for individual projects is linked from the Projects page (GitHub).
